title: Service Portal mobile browser rendering incorrectly
excerpt: Unable to use the service portal on a mobile browser. The screen renders beyond the viewable window and does not allow it to be scrollable. Is this a known issue? I tried chatting with support, and raising the issue thro…

posts.author: baraya (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Unable to use the service portal on a mobile browser. The screen renders beyond the viewable window and does not allow it to be scrollable. Is this a known issue? I tried chatting with support, and raising the issue through an the app ticket.
